subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This servant hath aligned himself with him who proclaimeth the Covenant at the pole of all horizons and watereth them that are athirst [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبد انتسب الی من ینادی بالمیثاق فی قطب الافاق و یسقی الطالبین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for pilgrims, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant
